name: Elves Report
description: Produce a morning-after report for an Elves run.

steps.name: gather
steps.prompt:
Gather all Elves run state.

Read execution log, survival guide, learnings, batch logs, git commits, PR/check status, and any blockers. Record source paths in `docs/elves/report-{{ id }}.md`.

steps.name: summarize
steps.prompt:
Write the morning-after Elves report.

Include final status, timeline, completed batches, validation evidence, PR status, unresolved issues, decisions made, lessons learned, risks, and concrete human next steps. Use the requested format: {{ report_format }}.

steps.name: review
steps.prompt:
Review the Elves report for accuracy.

Cross-check claims against logs, commits, tests, PR status, and remaining blockers. Fix overstatements or missing risks before handing to the user.

on_reject.prompt:
The report was rejected: {{ rejection_reason }}

Correct the report and review it again.
